top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Síkela at the joint press conference with Greenlandic Prime Minister Nielsen in Nuuk, Greenland
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 20 May 2026 Prime Minister Nielsen, ladies and gentlemen,
It is a real pleasure to be in Nuuk.
I have never visited a place quite like Greenland - with its pure nature and ...
